features.name: Authentication System
features.description: Google OAuth authentication with Supabase Auth, user profiles and role management

features.name: College Management
features.description: Create and manage educational centers with full CRUD operations

features.name: Class Management
features.description: Organize classes and groups with different levels and schedules

features.name: Student Management
features.description: Manage student profiles, enrollment, and academic progress

features.name: Skills Management
features.description: Define and organize chess skills by categories and difficulty levels

features.name: Attendance System
features.description: Track student attendance with status management and analytics

features.name: Payment Management
features.description: Handle student fees, school payments, and financial tracking

features.name: Interactive Chess Board
features.description: Fully functional chess board for exercises and game analysis

features.name: Tournament System
features.description: Create and manage local chess tournaments with Swiss and round-robin formats

features.name: Analytics Dashboard
features.description: Comprehensive analytics and reporting system with student progress tracking

features.name: Subscription Management
features.description: Handle user subscriptions, plans, and billing

features.name: Communication System
features.description: Announcements and messaging system for families and administration

features.name: Gamification Features
features.description: Points, levels, badges, and achievement tracking system

features.name: UI Components
features.description: Reusable UI components for consistent user experience

features.name: Local Storage Management
features.description: Client-side data persistence for offline functionality

features.name: Utility Functions
features.description: Helper functions for animations, date handling, and toast notifications

features.name: API Layer
features.description: RESTful API endpoints for all application features

features.name: Database Schema
features.description: Complete PostgreSQL schema with RLS policies and seed data
